import io
import string
import list

fn read_into(_ acc: List<Int>, _ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut out = acc
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        out = list.push(out, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    nums = read_into(nums, s)
  when None
    ()
  end
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    nums = read_into(nums, s)
  when None
    ()
  end

  let n = nums.len()
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut k = 0
  while k < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  while count < n
    mut min_idx = -1
    mut j = 0
    while j < n
      match used.get(j)
      when Some(u)
        if u == 0
          if min_idx == -1
            min_idx = j
          else
            match nums.get(j)
            when Some(v)
              match nums.get(min_idx)
              when Some(mv)
                if v < mv
                  min_idx = j
                end
              when None
                ()
              end
            when None
              ()
            end
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end

    match nums.get(min_idx)
    when Some(v)
      let already = if sorted.len() == 0
        false
      else
        match sorted.get(sorted.len() - 1)
        when Some(last)
          last == v
        when None
          false
        end
      end
      if not already
        sorted = list.push(sorted, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end

    mut new_used: List<Int> = []
    mut m = 0
    while m < n
      if m == min_idx
        new_used = list.push(new_used, 1)
      else
        match used.get(m)
        when Some(u)
          new_used = list.push(new_used, u)
        when None
          new_used = list.push(new_used, 0)
        end
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    used = new_used
    count = count + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  while p < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(p)
    when Some(v)
      if p == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
